name: MousePointerLock
shortDescription: Lock and hide mouse pointer for unlimited movement (e.g., FPS mouse look).

eventsBasedBehaviors.description: Control camera rotations with a mouse.
eventsBasedBehaviors.name: FirstPersonPointerMapper

eventsFunctions.name: HorizontalSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the horizontal rotation speed factor of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetHorizontalSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the horizontal rotation speed factor of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: VerticalSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the vertical rotation speed factor of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetVerticalSpeed
eventsFunctions.description: Change the vertical rotation speed factor of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: VerticalAngleMin
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the minimum vertical camera angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetVerticalAngleMin
eventsFunctions.description: Change the minimum vertical camera angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: VerticalAngleMax
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the maximum vertical camera angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetVerticalAngleMax
eventsFunctions.description: Change the maximum vertical camera angle of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: OffsetZ
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the z position offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: SetOffsetZ
eventsFunctions.description: Change the z position offset of the object.

eventsFunctions.name: RequestPointerLock
eventsFunctions.description: Lock the mouse pointer to hide it.

eventsFunctions.name: ExitPointerLock
eventsFunctions.description: Unlocks the mouse pointer and show it.

eventsFunctions.name: isPointerLocked
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the mouse pointer is locked.

eventsFunctions.name: IsMoving
eventsFunctions.description: Check if the locked pointer is moving.

eventsFunctions.name: MovementX
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the movement of the locked pointer on the X axis.

eventsFunctions.name: MovementY
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the movement of the pointer on the Y axis.

eventsFunctions.name: TouchSpeedFactor
eventsFunctions.description: Compare the speed factor for touch movement.

eventsFunctions.name: SetTouchSpeedFactor
eventsFunctions.description: Change the speed factor for touch movement.

description:
This behavior removes the limit on the distance the mouse can move and hides the cursor.

For example, a user can rotate or continue to manipulate an object by moving the mouse endlessly ([open the project online](https://editor.gdevelop.io/?project=example://mouse-pointer-lock)).
Without the pointer lock, the rotation or operation will stop the moment the pointer reaches the edge of the browser or screen.

Game players don't have to worry about leaving the gameplay area or accidentally clicking on another application that moves the mouse focus away from the game.

Locking the pointer locks `CursorX()` and `CursorY()` expressions.
Use `MovementX()` and `MovementY()` instead.
